name: Paper
description: Clean, minimal, content-focused theme with warm whites and soft grays. Inspired by high-end writing apps like iA Writer, Bear, and Notion.

decorators.paper-canvas: Warm cream background in light mode, soft charcoal in dark. Clean foundation for content.
decorators.paper-surface: Clean panel surface with subtle warmth. Used for sidebars and elevated areas.
decorators.paper-card: Minimal card styling with 1px warm border, 6px radius, no shadow. Content over decoration.
decorators.paper-input: Warm gray border with teal focus ring. Clean input styling for forms and editors.
decorators.paper-divider: Hairline separator using warm gray. Subtle content division.
decorators.paper-prose: Optimized typography for reading. 16px base, 1.75 line-height, Inter font stack, max-width 680px.
decorators.paper-comment: Comment bubble with subtle shadow and presence color accent. Used in comment threads.
decorators.paper-cursor: Remote cursor SVG with name label. Colored by collaborator presence color.
decorators.paper-presence: Avatar ring indicating collaborator presence. Ring color matches assigned presence color.
decorators.paper-selection: Highlighted text selection for remote collaborators. Tinted with presence color at 20% opacity.
decorators.paper-fade: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, 180ms natural easing. No translation.

editor.description: Document editor with real-time collaboration. Page tree, editor, and comment sidebar.

workspace.description: Workspace dashboard with activity and recent documents.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with clean card styling.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with generous whitespace.

paper-canvas.description: Warm cream background in light mode, soft charcoal in dark. Clean foundation for content.
paper-canvas.intent: Use as the root background to create the warm, paper-like reading environment. The cream tone reduces eye strain for long-form content.

paper-surface.description: Clean panel surface with subtle warmth. Used for sidebars and elevated areas.
paper-surface.intent: Use for navigation panels and sidebar areas that need subtle elevation above the canvas without drawing attention from content.

paper-card.description: Minimal card styling with 1px warm border, 6px radius, no shadow. Content over decoration.
paper-card.intent: Use for content containers where the card itself should be nearly invisible. Minimal styling keeps focus on content.

paper-input.description: Warm gray border with teal focus ring. Clean input styling for forms and editors.
paper-input.intent: Use for form inputs and editor controls. The teal focus ring provides clear visibility without being aggressive.

paper-divider.description: Hairline separator using warm gray. Subtle content division.
paper-divider.intent: Use to gently separate content sections. Near-invisible separators maintain the clean, content-focused aesthetic.

paper-prose.description: Optimized typography for reading. 16px base, 1.75 line-height, Inter font stack, max-width 680px.
paper-prose.intent: Use for the main document editing and reading area. Optimized line-height and width ensure comfortable long-form reading.

paper-comment.description: Comment bubble with subtle shadow and presence color accent. Used in comment threads.
paper-comment.intent: Use for comment threads alongside documents. The presence color accent ties each comment to its author.

paper-cursor.description: Remote cursor SVG with name label. Colored by collaborator presence color.
paper-cursor.intent: Use to show real-time collaborator cursor positions in the editor. Each cursor uses its collaborator's presence color.

paper-presence.description: Avatar ring indicating collaborator presence. Ring color matches assigned presence color.
paper-presence.intent: Use to display which collaborators are currently active in the document. The colored ring provides quick identification.

paper-selection.description: Highlighted text selection for remote collaborators. Tinted with presence color at 20% opacity.
paper-selection.intent: Use to show text selected by remote collaborators in real-time. Low opacity ensures readability.

paper-fade.description: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, 180ms natural easing. No translation.
paper-fade.intent: Use as the entrance animation for content. Pure fade without translation keeps the calm, distraction-free aesthetic.
